titleStmt.title: SII 39.248: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 248. (A.R. No. 248 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SAME PRĀKĀRA, JAṬĀVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA-8TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription registers the gift of some levies on their looms to the temple of Tirunārāyanīśvaramuḍaiyā[r] Aḻagiya nāyaṉār for its maintenance by the weavers, kaikōlars and kaikkōla mudali, who constituted the iḍangai-samayam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ śrī matkittikku mel koṟcaṭaipaṉmar tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī sundrapāṇḍidevaṟku yāṇṭu A tirumakaṉ pu
yattiriṉi tiruppa jayamaṭantai paṇikeṭaśva Orunāḷ veṇkuṭaik kiḻalakaṉaittum vantotuṅka kaṟva
taiyum surabhiyaiyum kāmukilaiyum kaittalattāl poṟpamanta Ina yaḷippa puviyeḻum pukaḻviḷaṅka yeṟṟi va
ṟku netiyaḷippa Ipuṟappuliyai muṉṉiyaṟṟi māṟṟācāvan tiṟaikucavintavaṟku I tiyaḷippa kalimeliyappakai paṇiya
c ceṅkolāl karuṅkaliyai melivittu ceḻumaṇi muṭi cūṭiyiḷaṅkomāṉ ciyyācciva ye davyamāka Aṭaṅka
larai muṉṉaḻuttu Iṭaṅkaic cimaiyam Iṉitu naṭattikiṟkaik koḷāvar mutta muṭṭattuk kaikkoḷḷarum kaikkoḷa mutalika
ḷum niṉṟavaḷ niṟaintu kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Orumaip piṭipāṭu paṇṇiṉa paricāvatu Ivvūril nāyaṉār tirunārāyaṇiśvaramuṭaiyar
Aḻakiya nāyaṉārkku Ivvāṭai māci mātam patiṉ Ēḻāntiyati mutal pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum maṭalāka nāṅkaḷ kuṭutta toyam
puvukku Oru Āḷak kūliyum Orumepāvukku pattukkācukku Orukācum potukkācukaḷum teceya Ippaṭikku Inta mutaluḷḷatu
taṇṭik koḷḷavum Ippaṭikku candrāditavaraiyum cella kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷka Itukku Ilaṅkaṇakku
Digital edition of SII 39.248 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
